transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my GFCI outlet is hot to the touch and it's getting bad! This is Carlos Mendez at 640 Willow Way. Dispatcher: Okay Carlos, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 640 Willow Way right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: GFCI outlet is hot to the touch
